title: Cursed Fate Multiverse
description: This mod adds cursed techniques to the Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate mod based on popular anime characters.
body:
# Cursed Fate Multiverse

Cursed Fate Multiverse is an addon mod for Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate that expands the cursed energy system by introducing cursed techniques inspired by popular anime characters from across the multiverse.

Built to integrate seamlessly with the base mod, this addon focuses on expanding combat variety, character builds, and overall gameplay depth while staying faithful to the mechanics and balance philosophy of Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate.

### Current techniques added:
Bleach-Ichigo(Zangetsu) including 2 of his iconic outfits and 2 versions of his zanpakuto.

**_To disable world destruction and certain music please use the commands:_**
- /gamerule ichigoMaxOutputMusic
- /gamerule ichigoWorldDestruction

Check out our discord server! https://discord.gg/CYETnXmX2j

_⚠️ This mod requires Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Fate and will not function without it._

## Developers

Igor (aka chonzzi)

Wagyu (aka wagyublehh)

### Assets & Models

Mark (aka markdark901) — Models & armor

Gumel (aka bwarethagoat) — Armor
